overall.description: Cyberpunk 2077 gameplay footage showing first-person exploration of a neon-lit urban plaza with towering skyscrapers and holographic advertisements, transitioning to high-speed driving on an elevated highway beneath illuminated overpasses. The scene features a futuristic cityscape with cyan and magenta neon lighting against a dusky sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic urban plaza with holographic advertising towers

agents.ego_description: walking slowly through the neon-lit plaza, observing the towering skyscrapers and holographic billboards

entered.detail: massive black glass tower with vertical cyan neon light strips
tall building covered with stacked holographic advertisements showing various characters
ground surface with glowing cyan WARNING text and geometric patterns
smooth concrete balcony edge in the foreground

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a vast cyberpunk plaza at dusk, dominated by a colossal neon-lit skyscraper complex ahead. To the left, a building facade displays stacked holographic advertisements. The ground features glowing cyan warning markings. The camera moves slowly forward through this empty, futuristic urban space.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition from plaza to elevated highway ramp

events.description: moving from the open plaza onto the elevated highway entrance ramp
accelerating as the perspective shifts to vehicle driving speed

agents.ego_description: transitioning from walking to driving, entering the highway ramp and accelerating

entered.detail: concrete barrier with metal rail along the highway edge
massive concrete highway overpass with support columns

segments.scene_description: The camera moves from the plaza toward the highway entrance, with the neon skyscraper shifting to the left. The environment transitions from open plaza to the highway ramp, with concrete guardrails entering the foreground. The motion accelerates as the perspective shifts to driving.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated highway with holographic advertisement overpasses

events.description: passing a red sports car in the adjacent lane
driving under a series of massive overpasses with holographic ceiling displays

agents.ego_description: driving at high speed along the multi-lane highway, passing under illuminated overpasses with holographic displays

notable_agents.action: red sports car overtaking in the right lane

entered.detail: massive curved holographic screens displaying advertisements on the overpass sides
illuminated panels on the underside of overpasses showing celestial imagery
dark mountain range visible on the horizon beyond the highway

segments.scene_description: The final segment features high-speed driving on an elevated highway beneath massive overpasses lined with holographic advertisements. The skyscraper plaza fades from view as the camera passes under illuminated ceiling displays. Other vehicles share the road, including a red sports car that overtakes on the right, while distant mountains appear on the horizon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a slow exploration of a neon-lit urban plaza into a high-speed drive along an elevated highway. It begins by gliding forward through a vast, empty futuristic space dominated by a colossal skyscraper complex and stacked holographic advertisements reflecting off glowing cyan ground markings. As the camera approaches the highway entrance, the skyscraper shifts to the left and the open plaza gives way to concrete guardrails, with the pace of motion accelerating into a driving perspective. The scene then shifts to a rapid surge beneath massive overpasses lined with illuminated ceiling displays, leaving the plaza behind as other vehicles, including a red sports car, zip past. Finally, the perspective opens up to reveal distant mountains on the horizon while speeding through the cyan and magenta glow of the cityscape.
